case_title: LISA D DI SANTO VS. SHIRLEY HORNSTEIN et al

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DI SANTO, LISA D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNSTEIN, SHIRLEY $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00, DEFENDANT CORNELIA HORNSTEIN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR A LACK OF EVIDENCE THAT SHE WAS A PARTY TO THE MASTER LEASE AGREEMENT.
